case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. JACQUELINE C. LINDELL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINDELL, JACQUELINE C. $5,050.99 PRINCIPAL, $2,479.26 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,530.25

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAY-04-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
